title: When password changes you are not logged out from other computers.
excerpt: If I change my password the system does not log out from other computers where I was previously logged in. I can even continue working normally without being notified or logged out.  This is a serious concern because if …

posts.author: lpmontenegro (Luis Pedro Montenegro)
posts.cookedHtml: If I change my password the system does not log out from other computers where I was previously logged in. I can even continue working normally without being notified or logged out. This is a serious concern because if my computer get’s stolen or a removed member from the company keeps access, this creates a serious security issue.
